aronui.when_to_use: When the user asks to rewrite or replace a specific sentence/paragraph in the currently open editor document.
aronui.output_shape: Returns a success message or an error indicating failure (e.g., no active session or text not found).

pitfalls.text: The tool requires an active editor session (Web UI with an active chat session). Without it, even valid parameters produce: 'error: Error: No active session (replace in editor is only available in the
Missing required fields 'old_text' and 'new_text' trigger a missing-fields error, but due to prerequisite session check, actual error observed in attempts was the session error.

procedure: Ensure there is an active chat session in the Web UI (editor must be open).
Provide the exact text snippet to replace as 'old_text' (required).
Optionally specify 'occurrence_index' if the old_text appears multiple times in the document (integer, default 0).
Call the tool with the correct parameters.
verification: Check that the specified text in the editor has been replaced with new_text.
If an error is returned, verify the active session and the exactness of old_text.
